channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Netflix Launches 'Netflix Playground' App Featuring Popular Children's Characters
item.description: Netflix has introduced a new gaming app called 'Netflix Playground', aimed at children aged eight and under. The app features games based on beloved children's characters such as Peppa Pig, Dr. Seuss’...

item.title: Impact of New Wage Code on Salaries and Retirement Benefits from April 2026
item.description: Starting from 1st April 2026, the Indian government has implemented major labour reforms under the New Wage Code, affecting how salaried employees are paid across the country. A key change mandates th...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over AI in Environmental Assessments as It Risks Harm to Biodiversity
item.description: Conservationists and scientists have raised alarm over a proposal by the Minerals Council of Australia to trial AI in national environmental assessments. The proposal could potentially lead to failure...

item.title: Understanding the Crisis of the Rules-Based International Order
item.description: The concept of a ‘rules-based international order’ has been facing significant challenges in recent years. Initially, the term emerged to describe a global framework established after the two World Wa...

item.title: Ely Buendia Brings ‘Combo on the Run’ Documentary to North America with Live Performances
item.description: Ely Buendia, the iconic frontman of the legendary Filipino band Eraserheads, will be taking his documentary, ‘Combo on the Run,’ to North America. This documentary, which chronicles the band’s journey...

item.title: Details on US Pilot's Survival and Rescue After F-15 is Shot Down in Iran
item.description: A US fighter pilot was rescued from a mountain in rural Iran after his F-15E Strike Eagle jet was shot down by Iranian forces. The incident marked the first time a US aircraft had been downed by Irani...

item.title: Tamil Nadu court sentences nine police officers to death for 2020 Sathankulam custodial killings
item.description: In a landmark judgment delivered on April 6, 2026, a Tamil Nadu court sentenced nine police officers to death for their role in the 2020 Sathankulam custodial deaths of father and son, P Jayaraj and J...

item.title: Cameroon President Appoints Son as Vice President Amid Succession Concerns
item.description: Things are getting interesting in Cameroon! President Paul Biya, who has been leading the nation since 1982, has appointed his son, Franck Emmanuel, as the country’s new vice president. This move come...

item.title: Reconsidering Society’s Reaction to Teenage Shoplifting in London
item.description: Zoe Williams addresses the recent uproar over teenage shoplifting incidents in Clapham, south-west London, and critiques the sensational response from media, politicians, and the public. The episode, ...

item.title: Affordable bedroom upgrades for spring cleaning
item.description: This article offers a practical spring-cleaning checklist focused on refreshing a bedroom with low-cost Amazon products. It starts with decluttering surfaces such as the nightstand, dresser, and floor...

item.title: Court Dismisses Interim Administration For Jumbo Major House In Bonny Kingdom
item.description: A Port Harcourt High Court, led by Hon. Justice Teetito, has ruled against the formation of a caretaker committee or any form of interim administration for the Jumbo Major House of Grand Bonny Kingdom...

item.title: Trump claims role in India-Pakistan ceasefire while addressing Iran conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump has once again claimed responsibility for ending the three-day India-Pakistan conflict, stating that his intervention saved 30 to 50 million lives. The India-Pakistan confron...

item.title: Chhattisgarh CM to discuss Bastar’s post-Maoist development plan with PM Modi and Amit Shah
item.description: With Maoist violence largely eliminated from the Bastar region of Chhattisgarh, Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sai is scheduled to meet Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Union Home Minister Amit Shah in New...

item.title: OVP implements four-day workweek with remote Fridays
item.description: The Office of the Vice President (OVP) has officially adopted a four-day workweek for its employees, effective immediately. Under this arrangement, OVP offices will operate from Monday to Thursday, 8 ...

item.title: Parliament dismisses opposition's notice to remove Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar
item.description: In the recent proceedings of the Indian Parliament, the opposition parties submitted a notice seeking a motion to remove the Chief Election Commissioner, Gyanesh Kumar. However, this notice was reject...

item.title: Expert-tested review: Top compression socks for runners and marathon training
item.description: Authored by CNN Underscored health and fitness editor Summer Cartwright, this detailed review shares expert recommendations for the most effective compression socks for runners. After personally testi...

item.title: Mackenzie and 95 Co-Accused Begin Defence in Shakahola Cult Trial
item.description: The Shakahola trial, concerning the deaths of hundreds of followers of Paul Mackenzie's Good News International (GNI) church, has entered a critical stage as Mackenzie and his 95 co-accused begin pres...

item.title: Seun Kuti Shares Insights on His Father Fela Kuti's Personal Life and Relationships
item.description: Afrobeat singer Seun Kuti, wey be the youngest pikin of the legendary Fela Kuti, don yan tori wey shock some people about him late papa and him wives. For one Instagram Live session, wey clip don go v...

item.title: Google urges Bitcoin network to upgrade security to defend against quantum computing threats
item.description: Google researchers have flagged that Bitcoin's $US1.4 trillion network requires urgent security upgrades to counter potential hacking from quantum computers. Their study suggests that fewer than 500,0...

item.title: DTI introduces MSME loan program with no collateral, offers up to P5M
item.description: The Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) in the Philippines has launched a new program aimed at supporting micro, small, and medium enterprises (MSMEs). Through this initiative, MSMEs can access loa...
